data.content: Kravix Assistant is an AI-powered domain expert built to help you navigate the Kravix food delivery platform. For customers, I can find food, track orders, and answer policy questions. For sellers, I can explain payouts and menu management. For riders, I can guide you on earnings and OTPs. For admins, I summarize analytics.

You can manage your Profile (Name, Phone, Email) in the Profile Settings tab. Authentication is handled via Email OTP or Social Logins (Google/Facebook). If you are blocked or banned, you must contact support@kravix.com for manual unblocking.
Customers can search for foods or restaurants, view real-time ETAs, apply discount coupons at checkout, reorder previous meals instantly, top up the Kravix Wallet, and manage delivery addresses.
aliases: what can i do as customer

data.content: Sellers have a dedicated Dashboard to toggle online/offline status, update menu prices, accept or reject incoming orders, create custom discount coupons, and view daily/weekly revenue analytics.
Riders use the Rider App to toggle availability, receive GPS directions to restaurants and customers, view weekly earnings and incentives, and manage fixed/flexible login shifts.

Admins have access to a super-dashboard. They can verify or reject new seller/rider applications, monitor live platform analytics, resolve active disputes, override order statuses, and block/unblock any user.

If the app crashes or shows a white screen, try clearing the app cache or updating to the latest version from the App Store/Play Store. For GPS issues, ensure Location Services are set to 'High Accuracy'.

If a payment gets stuck or fails but the money is debited, do not pay again. Wait 15 minutes to see if the order confirms. If it auto-cancels, the gateway will automatically refund your money within 3-5 business days.
New users can register using their phone number with OTP verification, or sign up instantly using Google or Facebook login. Only one account is allowed per verified phone number.
Customers can save restaurants or dishes to Favorites/Wishlist for quick access, and the app automatically keeps a Recent Searches list to speed up future ordering.

Customers can refer friends using a personal referral code; both parties get wallet credit once the referred friend completes their first order. Push notifications can be customized in Settings for order updates, offers, and reminders.

Kravix Premium is a paid monthly/annual membership offering free delivery on eligible orders, exclusive discounts, and early access to deals. It can be subscribed to or cancelled anytime from the Profile Settings tab.

Sellers can track ingredient-level inventory, generate weekly sales and settlement reports, and view customer review summaries directly from dashboard widgets designed to highlight action items each morning.

Admins can run fraud detection scans that flag unusual order patterns (e.g., repeated refund abuse, fake ratings), moderate reported reviews or content, and review audit logs of all admin-level actions taken on the platform.

Platform-wide coupons (funded by Kravix) and restaurant-specific coupons (funded by sellers) can both have usage limits, minimum purchase requirements, first-order-only eligibility, and expiry dates configured by admins or sellers respectively.

Kravix Assistant supports queries in English, Hindi, and Bengali, including mixed-language (code-switched) messages, and will reply in the language the user is most comfortable with based on their message or app language setting.

Kravix Assistant remembers the context of your current conversation, so you can ask follow-up questions like 'and what about refunds?' without repeating your original question. Memory resets when a new chat session starts.
